name: Paella (Garcia)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lean pork spareribs, cut into pieces
1 lb Chorizo or other spicy sausage
1 can Black or Green olives (4-6 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a paella pan or Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add spareribs and brown them all over. Remove and set aside.
3. Remove casings from chorizo, add it to the oil and brown, crumbling as it browns.
4. Add garlic, water, salt, pepper, and tomatoes. Return ribs to the pan.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, wash clams, shrimp, and lobster; remove shells and veins from shrimp; cut lobster into 1-inch pieces.
7. Slowly add rice to the simmering mixture. Cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Add clams, prawns, and lobster. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
9. Add cilantro, peas, and olives. Cook until rice is tender, about 10 more minutes.
10. Serve immediately.
